cases.prompt: Open gstack browser so you can control my browser.

assertions.text: The skill launches the GStack Browser, an AI-controlled Chromium window.
The launched window includes the sidebar extension with a live activity feed and chat.

cases.prompt: 크롬 브라우저 띄워줘, 실제 브라우저로 보여줘.

assertions.text: The skill launches a real controlled Chromium browser window.
The browser shows the side panel with activity feed and chat.
The launched browser has anti-bot stealth built in.

cases.prompt: Show me the browser — launch a real browser I can watch.

assertions.text: The skill produces a controlled Chromium window the user can watch.
The window surfaces a live sidebar activity feed of what the agent is doing.
